title: Collegium recommends elevation of 3 judicial officers as Karnataka High Court judges
description: The Supreme Court Collegium has recommended the appointment of three judicial officers as judges of the Karnataka High Court.The recommendation was made by the Collegium following a meeting held on April 14.The following are the judicial officers approved for elevation:(i) Rajeshwari Narayana Hegde,(ii) Kedambadi Ganesh Shanthi, and(iii) Mahadevappa Brungesh.At present, the Karnataka High Court has a working strength of 45 judges against its approved strength of 62.[Read Statement
